def solve(grid: list[list[int]], x: int, y: int, k: int) -> list[list[int]]:
    # Extract the submatrix
    submatrix = []
    for i in range(x, x + k):
        submatrix.append(grid[i][y:y + k])
    # Reverse the submatrix rows
    reversed_submatrix = submatrix[::-1]
    # Replace the original rows
    for i in range(x, x + k):
        for j in range(y, y + k):
            grid[i][j] = reversed_submatrix[i - x][j - y]
    return grid

def solve(grid : Array(Array(Int64)), x : Int64, y : Int64, k : Int64) : Array(Array(Int64))

  (x..x + k).each do |i|
    submatrix << grid[i][y..y + k]
  end

  (x..x + k).each do |i|
    (y..y + k).each do |j|
      grid[i][j] = reversed_submatrix[i - x][j - y]
    end
  end
  return grid
end
```
